★ MVP

Janell Hill-Bridget

✦ Quantum Birthday Recipient ✦

ZODIAC Taurus ♉
RARITY ✦ Ultra Rare Holo
EDITION 2026 Edition
CARD ID HC-001

Bio & Attributes 💎

Janell is a legendary individual, known across multiple servers and quantum realms for her dazzling aura, stellar fashion sense, and crystal-clear energy. This card represents a yearly extraction from the friendship field, designed to celebrate another year of her amazing existence!

She is certified 100% awesome, immune to bad vibes, and possesses a passive skill: Instant Sparkle, which automatically brightens up any room she walks into. ✨

SPARKLE LEVEL OVER 9000
